isolation.testDataScope: No persistent records created; only local API request payloads were sent.

assertions.title: Creating a post with a custom pillar name succeeds

steps.action: Set local dispatch-token via POST /api/auth and retry POST /api/posts
steps.expected: Authenticated request reaches create-post logic and returns 201
steps.observed: 401 Unauthorized again; dummy cookie is not a valid InsForge auth session

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing valid authenticated InsForge session cookie; route exits at auth guard before custom-pillar insert path can be validated.

assertions.title: POST /api/posts rejects invalid and extra fields

steps.action: Retry both invalid payloads with dummy dispatch-token cookie

assertions.issues: Blocked by auth prerequisite; unable to reach Zod validation branch that should return 400 for invalid payloads.

assertions.title: AI generation uses per-user context

steps.action: Retry POST /api/generate using dummy dispatch-token cookie
steps.expected: Authenticated request returns generated text personalized to user context

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing valid authenticated InsForge session; cannot observe generated output to confirm per-user context behavior.

frictions.description: Authenticated API assertions could not proceed because no valid InsForge session token was available via curl-only flow.
frictions.resolution: Attempted local cookie setup via /api/auth using a dummy token; auth guard still returned 401.

blockers.description: Repo root .env.local is missing and no reusable authenticated test credentials/session cookie were available for curl execution.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified .env.local absence and attempted to set dispatch-token via /api/auth; protected routes still returned 401.

summary: Tested 3 assigned curl assertions. 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked due to missing valid authenticated InsForge session for protected API routes.
